facebook.caption:
439 reviews. 4.5 stars. A vegan restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Nhà Hàng Chay NẤM on Đường Nguyễn Trãi is quietly stacking one of the highest review counts for plant-based food on the island. No gimmicks. Just consistent food that keeps people coming back.

If you're vegan, vegetarian, or just taking a break from seafood, this one's worth finding.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: The camera pans down a full table at Nhà Hàng Chay NẤM. 439 people reviewed this place. Most of them came back. Plant-based eating in Phu Quoc just got a lot easier.
